items.title: MISTAKE: Posts read like marketing copy instead of genuine human disc

structuredContext.rawContent:
What went wrong: Posts read like marketing copy instead of genuine human discussion
How to avoid: ALL social media posts must sound like a real human wrote them: casual voice, occasional misspelling or small grammatical mistake, no marketing buzzwords, no perfect formatting. This applies to ALL future posts on every platform.
